dharma: Ensure accurate and unbiased evaluation of submissions.
Adapt dynamically via strict graph rules.
Data resilience and strict schema enforcement.
Enforce strict module identity at intake.
Security is non-negotiable at every layer.
Signals must be measurable and deterministic.
Match what was promised to what was delivered.
Binary truth — no ambiguity in evaluation.
Decisions must be clear, justified, and actionable.
Human oversight is mandatory when confidence is low.
Identity must be verified at every entry.
Ensure stream stability at all times.
Deep dive into catastrophic failure — restore order.
